summary: Iteration 63 - Multi-Club/Franchise Migration Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend working correctly for both Super Admin and Manager roles.

ui_bugs.issue: Month text duplicated as 'mars 2026mars 2026' in header selector

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key '2026-03'. Non-unique keys may cause issues.

action_items: Fix duplicate month text in header selector (LOW priority)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-club migration verified. 4 clubs: Transform Versoix (325 members, 27 KPIs, 3424 transactions), Transform Grand Saconnex (empty), Transform Servette (empty), Transform Lausanne (empty). Super Admin can see/switch all 4 clubs. Manager only sees Transform Versoix. X-Club-Id header filters all data correctly.

get_clubs_super_admin.evidence: Returns 4 clubs: Transform Versoix, Grand Saconnex, Servette, Lausanne

members_filter_versoix.evidence: GET /api/members with X-Club-Id Versoix returns 325 members

members_filter_empty_club.evidence: GET /api/members with X-Club-Id Grand Saconnex returns 0 members

kpis_filter_versoix.evidence: GET /api/monthly-kpis with X-Club-Id Versoix returns 27 KPIs

kpis_filter_empty_club.evidence: GET /api/monthly-kpis with X-Club-Id Grand Saconnex returns 0 KPIs

club_switch.evidence: PUT /api/clubs/switch works for super_admin, returns 403 for manager switching to other club

categories_filter.evidence: Versoix has 41 categories, empty clubs have 0

transactions_filter.evidence: Versoix has 3424 transactions, empty clubs have 0

frontend_club_selector_super_admin.evidence: Club selector dropdown visible with 4 options

frontend_club_selector_manager.evidence: Club selector NOT visible for manager (as expected)

frontend_dashboard_versoix.evidence: Dashboard shows data: 93 active members, 10793 CHF revenue, 29 coaches

frontend_dashboard_empty_club.evidence: Dashboard shows 0 values when switched to empty club
